title: S&P 500 Banks Make a Resounding Come Back QTD: 3 Solid Picks
text: After witnessing a challenging start to the year, banks are rebounding since July. Thus, Regions Financial (RF), M&T Bank (MTB) and Comerica (CMA) are worth betting on as these outperform the S&P 500 Index and have solid near-term prospects.

title: Why Is M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) Up 13% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: M&T Bank Donates Former Bank Building For New Workforce Development Center in York
text: Tec Centro York will offer educational, linguistic and job skills training to underserved individuals YORK, Pa. , Aug. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank is donating a recently closed bank branch in York to the Spanish American Civic Association (SACA) to create a new workforce development center that will help underemployed and unemployed residents find jobs in high-demand fields such as health care, construction, culinary arts and building maintenance.

title: M&T Bank Welcomes Ishet Dhar as Chief Digital Officer
text: BUFFALO, N.Y. , Aug. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank today announced the appointment of Ishet Dhar in the role of Chief Digital Officer (CDO).

title: M&T Bank Spotlights Connecticut Small Businesses in Innovative Pop-Up Shop Concept at Captain's Cove Seaport
text: Local small businesses will have access to retail space at Bridgeport's  premier tourist destination  BRIDGEPORT, Conn. , Aug. 11, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank is bringing its innovative Spotlight Shop concept to Connecticut, providing local small businesses with an opportunity to market their unique products from a pop-up space in Bridgeport's popular Captain's Cove Seaport.

title: M&T Bank Corporation (MTB) is a Top-Ranked Value Stock: Should You Buy?
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: M&T Bank Names Matthew Orrino Managing Director and Head of Institutional Commercial Real Estate Capital Markets
text: Orrino Brings Extensive Experience in Real Estate Capital Markets and Securitized Products to New Role within M&T Investment Banking NEW YORK , Aug. 1, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) ("M&T") announced that Matthew T. Orrino has been named a Managing Director and head of Institutional Commercial Real Estate (CRE) Capital Markets at M&T Investment Banking.
